headline: The Estée Lauder Companies Fully Establishes Its "One ELC" Operating Model and Reaches Milestone in Its Profit Recovery and Growth Plan
summary: NEW YORK, April 01, 2026--The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) today announced WPP as its first-ever global media partner, marking a significant advancement of its One ELC operating model, a scalable system designed to operate faster, execute with greater discipline, and drive growth. In fully establishing One ELC, the Company also reached a significant milestone in its Profit Recovery and Growth Plan’s (PRGP) Restructuring Program — a key action plan priority of Beauty Reimagined.

headline: Estée Lauder Merger Talks With Puig Put Valuation And Debt In Focus
summary: Estée Lauder Companies (NYSE:EL) and Spanish beauty group Puig have confirmed they are in talks about a potential merger. The discussions are ongoing, with no binding agreement or transaction terms announced so far. If completed, a deal would combine two large portfolios of global beauty, fragrance, and fashion brands. For you as an investor, these talks put fresh attention on how NYSE:EL is positioned within global beauty, spanning skincare, makeup, fragrance, and hair care. The broader...
